title: pilosella hypeurya subsp. pinguis
intro: Pilosella hypeurya subsp. pinguis is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion tribe within the sunflower family. It is used in herbal medicine, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can aid in the treatment of various health issues. The medicinal properties of Pilosella hypeurya subsp. pinguis have been traditionally used to improve digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, offering potential health benefits for individuals suffering from these conditions. This plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal remedies, and it is also used in some traditional medicine practices to promote overall well-being.
